title: Na Mawh Phel Nading Om Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong gum Topa min um in a kiang pai in,
Lungsiim hong bawl thaksak ding hi;
bawl nop lai-in pial kei in,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na mawhphel nading om hi (om hi);
Hong gum dingin Jesuh sizo hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna lampi zuihna in sihna ahi,
Itna tawh hong sapna, na nial lai ding hiam?

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong tung ding gal peelin singlamteh bel in,
Kiniamkhiatna na thumna, Kha Siangtho in,
Hong dawngin, thupha hong pia ding.
